title: Failed to list all images
body:
I followed https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/blob/master/install.md to install `buildah`,

Now I am trying to list all images,

```
$ buildah images
mkdir /var/run/containers/storage: permission denied
mkdir /var/run/containers/storage: permission denied
```
It's failing :(

comments.body: Probably your user doesn't have permissions to create `/var/run/containers/storage`. Thus try running `buildah` using `sudo`.
buildah has to run as root.
Thanks @ripcurld0  @rhatdan for clarification. Here's one more question, So `sudo buildah images` will not list images same as `docker images` ?

Right buildah shares github.com/containers/storage with other tools like CRI-O, podman, but not Docker.  Docker has a private container storage.  You can use skopeo to copy images out of a local Docker container storage into cri-o/buildah/podman container storage.  But when listing images these tools will only list "container/storage" images.
